1:
Methuli Cattlan has asked you to craft for her two high-quality crafting tool components for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>. The materials required for this task have already been bought and paid for, and you need only proceed to Finders' Bluff and speak with Ademar to collect them.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

Methuli Cattlan has asked you to craft for her two high-quality crafting tool components for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>. The materials required for this task have already been bought and paid for, and you need only proceed to Finders' Bluff and speak with Ademar to collect them.

3:
Hildeyerd has prepared the crafting facility for your use. With the materials you have obtained, synthesize two high-quality crafting tool components, and deliver them to Methuli Cattlan at Ehcatl.

※In the event that the status <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Facility Access: Detailing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> wears off or the synthesis ends in failure, you may try again by speaking with Hildeyerd.
